authority_stack.title: U.S. Coast Guard Marine Board report, SS Grandcamp PDF
U.S. Bureau of Mines: The Texas City Disaster, April 16, 1947
City of Texas City 1947 Disaster exhibit
Texas State Historical Association: Texas City Disaster

supported_claims: The disaster began with fire aboard SS Grandcamp on April 16, 1947.
Ammonium nitrate fertilizer cargo under heat/confinement conditions was central to the blast chain.
SS High Flyer made the disaster a port-wide cascade.
cautions: Death toll varies by source; use nearly 600 until final fact-check.
Ignition cause should be tied to official records.
Do not describe ammonium nitrate as merely flammable.
next_action: Mike/human source-audit disposition before writer packet.
